productName: Micro Bar - 1g Disposable - Micro Bar - Pumpkin Spice - 1g
description: An all-in-one hybrid disposable vape preloaded with Pumpkin Spice oil — no battery to charge, no cart to screw on, just unbox, draw, and enjoy. Zero setup, all flavor — with notes of apple and earthy, with a smooth, well-rounded vibe.
